---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behaviour
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Run `...`
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include full error messages.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Linux 6.1, Linux 6.12 {can be found with `uname -r`}]
- Rust version: [e.g. 1.74.0, found with `rustc --version`]
- Sherd version: [e.g. 1.0.0, found with `sherd --version`]
- How was sherd installed? [e.g. `cargo install --path .`]

## Additional context

Any other context about the problem here.
